hypothesis: If we use Δ-learning with XGBoost to predict the correction from GFN1-xTB to DFT (PBE/HSE06) band gaps using combined ST-135, RAC, and APRDF descriptors, then MOF band-gap predictions will achieve lower MAE than direct models and deep-learning baselines (MOFTransformer, CGCNN) because the semi-empirical band gaps provide a strong physical prior that the model only needs to correct for systematic errors.
